name: Chen
description: You can learn faith at the end of a sword.

abilities.name: Zealot
abilities.description: Whenever Chen respawns, he is joined by a Zealot, a melee warrior creep with the ability to sacrifice itself to heal or deal damage to an enemy. The Zealot respawns next to Chen after 60s.

abilities.name: Penitence
abilities.description: Deals damage and applies a movement speed slow on the debuff-affected enemy unit. Grants all allied units bonus attack speed while attacking the debuff-affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Holy Persuasion
abilities.description: Persuades an enemy or neutral creep, excluding ancient creeps, for Chen's purposes. Grants Chen a portion of the gold bounty of the persuaded unit. Sets the persuaded creep's max health while fully restoring its health and mana. Grants the persuaded creeps various bonuses as well upon joining Chen's fleet.

abilities.name: Divine Favor
abilities.description: Grants the affected allied hero bonus armor and an incoming heal amplification buff.

abilities.name: Hand of God
abilities.description: Heals all allied heroes and his player-controlled units globally. Using the mental link with his thralls, Chen calls down restoration and well-being to those who share his fanaticism.
